title: The Gate of Justice Looms
description: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Spandam, Luffy, Zoro, Blueno, Nami. The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You really... knowing all of that....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's all for the sake of justice.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That girl has our deepest condolences.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: How nostalgic, it's been five years...

summary: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
